Operation 'getShowIndex' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context. Original summary 'Show index' is too vague and not action-oriented. Description lacks clarity about pagination usage and caching implications for AI agents. Enhanced summary uses action verb and clarifies the operation retrieves all shows. Enhanced description explains pagination mechanics, caching behavior, and typical use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: List all shows in the database, paginated with 250 results per page. Cached for 24 hours.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all shows in the TVMaze database. Returns 250 results per page. Results are cached for 24 hours, so recently added shows may not appear immediately. Use the page parameter to navigate through results. Useful for bulk show discovery or synchronization.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Show index' is too vague and not action-oriented. Description lacks clarity about pagination usage and caching implications for AI agents. Enhanced summary uses action verb and clarifies the operation retrieves all shows. Enhanced description explains pagination mechanics, caching behavior, and typical use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getPersonUpdates' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary and description are too vague and lack critical details. The description doesn't explain the purpose (tracking updates), what the 'since' parameter does, or the structure of the response. Added context about pagination support, use cases for AI agents, and clarified that it returns person objects with timestamps for better interpretability.

data.current_description: All people and their last update timestamps.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all people with their last update timestamps
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a comprehensive list of all people in the database along with their last update timestamps. This operation is useful for tracking changes to person records and implementing synchronization logic. Returns an array of person objects with their corresponding update timestamps. Supports pagination via the 'since' parameter to retrieve only updates after a specific timestamp.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too vague and lack critical details. The description doesn't explain the purpose (tracking updates), what the 'since' parameter does, or the structure of the response. Added context about pagination support, use cases for AI agents, and clarified that it returns person objects with timestamps for better interpretability.

message: Operation 'getAlternateList' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original description lacks domain context about what 'alternate lists' represent and their purpose. The summary is too generic. Added explanation of what alternate lists are (alternative orderings), examples of use cases, and clarified the response structure. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Information about an alternate episode list.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific alternate episode list by ID. Alternate lists represent alternative episode orderings or groupings for a show (such as DVD order vs. broadcast order). Returns the alternate list object containing metadata about the list including its name, display name, and associated show information. Use this to understand how episodes may be reordered for different viewing contexts.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks domain context about what 'alternate lists' represent and their purpose. The summary is too generic. Added explanation of what alternate lists are (alternative orderings), examples of use cases, and clarified the response structure. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'getAlternateEpisodes' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original description is too brief and doesn't explain the relationship between alternate lists and episodes or why an AI agent would use this operation. Added context about different ordering types, clarified the response is an ordered array, and explained the typical workflow (get list metadata first, then get episodes). This improves AI agent interpretability for understanding when and how to chain operations.

data.current_description: Episodes in an alternate list ordering.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve episodes in alternate list ordering
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all episodes belonging to a specific alternate list, ordered according to that list's episode sequence. This operation returns the episodes as they are organized in the alternate ordering (e.g., DVD order, production order, or custom grouping) rather than broadcast order. Returns an array of episode objects arranged in the alternate list's specified order. Use this after retrieving an alternate list to get the actual episodes in their alternative sequence.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and doesn't explain the relationship between alternate lists and episodes or why an AI agent would use this operation. Added context about different ordering types, clarified the response is an ordered array, and explained the typical workflow (get list metadata first, then get episodes). This improves AI agent interpretability for understanding when and how to chain operations.

message: Operation 'getShowEpisodes' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Description lacks clarity about the return format (array of Episode objects) and specific fields available. Added details about what Episode data is returned and use cases to improve AI agent understanding of when to use this operation versus other episode-retrieval methods.

data.current_description: Complete list of episodes for a show, in airing order.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all episodes for a show, ordered by original air date. Returns an array of Episode objects containing episode metadata including season number, episode number, air date, and summary. Useful for building complete episode guides or accessing the full episode catalog for a show.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about the return format (array of Episode objects) and specific fields available. Added details about what Episode data is returned and use cases to improve AI agent understanding of when to use this operation versus other episode-retrieval methods.

message: Operation 'getEpisodesByDate' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks specificity about date format requirements and return structure. Added clarification on date parameter format, return type (array of Episode objects), and practical use cases to help AI agents understand when to use this versus other episode-retrieval methods.

data.current_description: All episodes for a show that aired on a specific date.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all episodes for a show that aired on a specific date. Requires the show ID and a date parameter (format: YYYY-MM-DD). Returns an array of Episode objects for episodes that aired on that exact date. Useful for finding what aired on a particular day or building daily TV schedules.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about date format requirements and return structure. Added clarification on date parameter format, return type (array of Episode objects), and practical use cases to help AI agents understand when to use this versus other episode-retrieval methods.

message: Operation 'getShowCast' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Description lacks clarity about return structure (array of CastMember objects) and what data is included. Added specificity about the CastMember schema, what Person data is embedded, and clarification that this returns main cast only to help AI agents distinguish this from other cast-related operations.

data.current_description: Main cast for a show, ordered by importance.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the main cast members for a show, ordered by billing importance. Returns an array of CastMember objects, each containing the actor's Person information and their character details. Includes primary cast only, not guest stars or recurring roles.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about return structure (array of CastMember objects) and what data is included. Added specificity about the CastMember schema, what Person data is embedded, and clarification that this returns main cast only to help AI agents distinguish this from other cast-related operations.

message: Operation 'getShowCrew' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Description is vague about return structure and what crew types are included. Added clarity about the CrewMember schema, examples of crew types, and that results are ordered by importance.
